title: Logic Scripting & Programming
description: Player programs logic processors with statements, views global variables, and uses the logic editor dialog

use_cases.name: Open Logic Editor
use_cases.entry_point: LogicDialog.show(String code, LExecutor executor, boolean privileged, Cons<String> modified)
use_cases.notes: Loads existing code into LCanvas, sets privileged flag, pauses game (shouldPause=true)

use_cases.name: Add Logic Statement
flow: Opens Add dialog with search field
Iterates LogicIO.allStatements (all @RegisterStatement types)
Filters by: privilege level, hidden(), nonPrivileged(), logicUnitControl rule, search text
Groups results by LCategory (io, block, operation, control, unit, world)
On selection: canvas.addAt(position, statement); dialog hides
Keyboard shortcut: Shift+Enter triggers showAddDialog()

use_cases.name: Clear All Statements
flow: Player clicks Edit > Clear
Confirmation dialog shown
On confirm: canvas.clearStatements()

use_cases.name: Copy Code to Clipboard
use_cases.notes: canvas.save() serializes all LStatement children via LogicIO.write()

use_cases.name: Import Code from Clipboard
use_cases.notes: Parses assembly text via LogicIO.read(tokens, length); button disabled if clipboard is null

use_cases.name: Restart Logic Processor
use_cases.notes: Forces modified consumer to fire even if code unchanged; triggers processor reload

use_cases.name: View Live Variables
flow: Iterates executor.vars (LVar[]); skips constant vars
Shows: name, live value (numval or objval via PrintI.toString), type color
Value label auto-refreshes every 15 ticks via label.update()
Unpauses game while dialog is open (state.set(State.playing))

use_cases.name: View Global Variables
flow: Reads logicVars.getEntries() (GlobalVars registry)
Renders section headers (entries named 'section*') and variable rows
Each entry shows: name, description (from bundle key 'lglobal.<name>')
use_cases.notes: Accessible from both the main variables dialog footer button and directly in editor mode

use_cases.name: Rename Logic Processor
use_cases.notes: Max name length: LogicBlock.maxNameLength; sets executor.build.tag

use_cases.name: Save / Apply Code
use_cases.notes: Fires when dialog closes; only calls modified consumer if code changed OR forceRestart=true

use_cases.name: Assemble & Execute Logic Statements
use_cases.notes: Build-time: LogicStatementProcessor generates LogicIO class with static read()/write() for all @RegisterStatement types; Runtime: LExecutor.load() compiles assembled instructions

use_cases.name: Run JavaScript Mods (Android)
flow: Checks/creates global AndroidContextFactory
API >= 26: InMemoryAndroidClassLoader (ByteBuffer-based DexClassLoader)
API < 26: FileAndroidClassLoader (writes .dex to cacheDir)
Both paths: Java bytecode → DexFile via CfTranslator → Dex → loadClass()
On context release: classLoader.reset() clears cached dex

key_classes.name: LogicDialog
key_methods: show(String code, LExecutor executor, boolean privileged, Cons<String> modified)

key_classes.name: GlobalVarsDialog
key_classes.notes: Reads logicVars.getEntries(); supports section headers via 'section' prefix naming

key_classes.name: LogicStatementProcessor
key_classes.role: Compile-time annotation processor; generates LogicIO class

methods: static write(Object obj, StringBuilder out) — serializes statement fields to text
static read(String[] tokens, int length): LStatement — deserializes from token array

key_classes.name: AndroidRhinoContext
inner_classes: AndroidContextFactory extends ContextFactory — manages ClassLoader lifecycle
BaseAndroidClassLoader extends ClassLoader, GeneratedClassLoader — JVM→DEX compiler
InMemoryAndroidClassLoader — API 26+, in-memory DEX via ByteBuffer

key_relationships: LogicIO.allStatements populated with all @RegisterStatement LStatement subclasses

effects: GlobalVars.get() returns null for privileged vars if caller is non-privileged

important_notes: LogicDialog pauses game (shouldPause=true) but temporarily unpauses when viewing live variables. Code save fires on dialog close via hidden() callback. Annotation processor LogicStatementProcessor runs at build time to generate the LogicIO read/write registry — not a runtime class. AndroidRhinoContext is Android-only and unrelated to the in-game logic statement system; it supports mod scripting via Rhino JS engine.
